name: ghl-wkfl-mcp
description: Manage GoHighLevel workflows from Claude — read, create, audit, edit, organise, and clone — using your existing Chrome session. No GHL API key required. Get the binary: https://ampware.io/ghl-wkfl-mcp/install

license_key.title: License Key
license_key.description: Optional paid license JWT. Leave blank for free read-only tools (list workflows, audit, folders). Paste your license key to unlock workflow mutations (create/update/delete/publish/clone). Get a license: https://ampware.io/ghl-wkfl-mcp/buy
